title: SourceRoutingHeader from_bytes: misleading TooShort error message
description: In rust/lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs SourceRoutingHeader::from_bytes(), when addr_bytes.len() is not a multiple of 16, the TooShort error is computed as 'data.len() + (16 - addr_bytes.len() % 16)' which gives a confusing 'expected' value. For example, if data is 10 bytes (6 header + 4 addr bytes), the error says expected 10 + 12 = 22, but the real issue is that 4 addr bytes isn't a valid multiple of 16. The error message is technically not wrong but misleading.
